### Summary
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Send a request to '...' / Click on '...'
3. See error

### Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages, HTTP status codes, or stack traces if applicable.

### Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or environmental details (e.g., OS, Node version, Docker setup) here.
